format_discipline.notes: No frontmatter; H1 first non-empty line; reading.meta.json valid; six sections in correct order

citation_discipline.notes: [1] cited in Overview, Key Concepts (multiple), In Practice, Takeaways. [2][3] cited throughout.

no_forward_references.notes: fine-tuning named-and-deferred in Overview; chain-of-thought named-and-deferred to 13.4 in In Practice. All new terms defined on first use: few-shot, in-context learning, context window, token.

beginner_readability.notes: All terms defined on first use; employee analogy before definition; no jargon dumps; plain register

formatting.notes: Tables for zero/one/few-shot and good-vs-weak comparisons; numbered steps in Worked Example; bullets in In Practice; bold-term definitions throughout

corpus_faithfulness.notes: All claims traceable to corpus §5.1–5.7, §6 implementation, §7 patterns, §8 best practices

verdict: PASS — reading meets all format, length, citation, readability, and faithfulness requirements on first cycle.
